comment: B-α 토큰 검사 (verify-migration.sh) 시 Markdown 문서/주석에서 교육용 등장이 허용되는 토큰. W-R1 교정.
allowed_contexts: table cell inside *.md describing migration mapping
comment block inside skill/agent prompt explaining what was converted
forbidden_contexts: active CC tool API call form (e.g., TaskCreate( in production code)
skill body outside fenced code block describing actual workflow
